text: AI-written code is welcome. Unexplained code is not.
AI accelerates code generation—but reviewer attention does not scale.
Sekisyo moves accountability upstream, before code reaches review.
A normal git push triggers repository-aware analysis with Codex.
The author resolves machine-detectable findings first.
GPT-5.6 asks questions that require understanding. Vague answers trigger follow-up.
Only concrete, verifiable explanations pass the checkpoint.
Sekisyo writes the attention map and design decisions into the pull request.
No server. No database. The local pass is disposable; the PR record remains.
Worker-first: reviewer relief follows from stronger authors.
